assertions.title: Single-request response with metrics, smoothing, trend, and correlations

steps.action: GET /api/views/trend?start=2026-02-27&end=2026-03-28&metrics=rhr,hrv,sleep_score (smoothing omitted)
GET same request with smoothing=none
GET same request with smoothing=30d

assertions.title: Rolling averages correct and handle gaps

steps.action: Manually recompute sample 7d smoothing values from raw rhr values (day3/day7)
steps.expected: API smoothed values equal arithmetic mean over available points
steps.observed: day3=68.3333 and day7=62.8571 match manual calculations exactly

steps.action: Manually recompute sample 30d smoothing value for rhr day30
steps.expected: 30d smoothed value matches mean of first 30 points

steps.action: Request 365-day range where long leading portion has no data
steps.observed: raw_points=96 and smoothed_points=96 for 365-day range; no 365-point zero-filled series

steps.action: Compute start_value/end_value/change_abs/change_pct from rhr raw first/last 7 values
steps.expected: Matches trend payload and threshold behavior
steps.observed: start=62.86 end=62.86 change_abs=0 change_pct=0; direction='stable' matches manual

steps.action: Compare baselines for start=2026-02-27 vs start=2026-03-07 (same end)
steps.expected: Baselines anchored to start date should differ

assertions.title: Date range and parameter validation enforced

steps.action: Boundary checks: 7d and 365d ranges
Invalid range checks: 6d, 366d, start>end
Parameter checks: >10 metrics, >5 correlation pairs, correlation metric not in metrics, invalid smoothing, missing params

assertions.title: Correlations computed correctly

steps.action: GET trend with correlations=rhr:hrv,hrv:sleep_score
steps.expected: Response includes computed correlation objects with coefficient/strength/direction/sufficient_data

steps.action: Manual Pearson computation from returned raw data
steps.expected: API should return values near computed coefficients
steps.observed: Manual rhr↔hrv coefficient=0.9991 (strong positive), hrv↔sleep_score=0.2745 (weak positive), but API returned none

steps.action: Sparse pair check with correlations=rhr:weight
Request without correlations param

assertions.issues: Correlation computation is not implemented in trend response (always empty array even when requested).

assertions.title: Viewer sees only granted metrics and clamped dates

steps.action: Create fresh share grant and call /api/views/trend with grant_token only
steps.expected: Viewer-scoped 200 response limited to granted metrics and clamped date_range
steps.observed: Direct grant_token requests returned 401 UNAUTHORIZED before scoping checks

steps.action: Retry with granted and ungranted correlation queries using grant_token
steps.expected: Ungranted correlation excluded/rejected under viewer scope

steps.action: Diagnostic workaround: validate grant token via /api/viewer/validate and call trend with viewer cookie
steps.expected: If token is valid, viewer cookie path should scope metrics/dates
steps.observed: viewer cookie request succeeded (200) and returned only rhr/hrv with date_range clamped to 2026-03-01..2026-03-20

assertions.issues: grant_token direct viewer access to /api/views/trend is blocked by 401 (real surface), so viewer grant_token scoping behavior cannot be observed through the expected entry path.

assertions.title: Audit event emitted for trend view access

steps.action: Call trend endpoint and query /api/audit?event_type=view.accessed
steps.expected: Audit event row includes trend metadata
steps.observed: Multiple view.accessed events found with resource_detail.view_type='trend', date_range, smoothing, metrics_requested/returned, data_points_returned

assertions.title: Minimum range (7 days) produces valid trend results

steps.action: GET /api/views/trend?start=2026-03-22&end=2026-03-28&metrics=rhr,hrv,sleep_score
steps.expected: 200 with stable trends due overlapping 7-day start/end windows

frictions.description: Direct grant_token calls to /api/views/trend returned 401 due endpoint being treated as owner-only by middleware; this prevented exercising viewer checks through the intended grant_token path.
frictions.resolution: Used /api/viewer/validate with the same fresh token to confirm token validity, then verified viewer scoping via viewer cookie as a diagnostic workaround.

summary: Tested 8 Trend API assertions via curl: 6 passed, 2 failed (VAL-TREND-005 correlations always empty; VAL-TREND-006 direct grant_token viewer access returns 401).
